review_title: Efficient and Flexible HR Management Tool
description: Zoho People has streamlined our HR operations, reduced manual effort, and provided better visibility into employee data. A reliable and scalable solution for growing businesses.
author: Aleshio A.
pros: Highly customizable workflows, easy attendance and leave management, clean UI, and strong integration with the Zoho ecosystem.
cons: Pricing can be on the higher side for small teams, occasional learning curve for advanced features, and mobile app could be more intuitive.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Zoho People Transformed our HR Department
description: Amazing - On a scale of 1 - 10 , it's a 100 for me. The fact that the manual to set up is readily available and the workflow to set up your account is very clear is a plus for me. The geo restriction feature in the attendance was the game changer for us in our organization.
author: Ebere O.
pros: I like the fact that it is user friendly and easy to set up. And even when you hit a wall, the support team is readily available to provide aid. This was a very investment and it has really helped us streamline our HR processes. I am so impressed with the LMS feature, it has made personalized training more seamless.
cons: Nothing comes to mind. It's been an amazing platform and it has helped us make our processes more seamless.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy handling
description: My overall experience with Zoho People has been quite positive, especially for day-to-day HR operations and employee management. It’s a practical tool that fits well for startups and growing teams.
author: Snehalatha M.
pros: I like the way of employee management and automation onboarding process and also access to zoho payroll as well
cons: Nothing feel least about zoho people but one thing in the payroll option also available in zoho people easy for us to manage in one dashboard
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Working with ZOHO is a fantastic experience
author: Bruce S.
pros: Zoho People has been an easy tool for everything an organization needs be it from time tracking to performance tracking everything can be done.
cons: Sometimes there are some backend issues that take time to get resolved.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Dynamic HR Handle
description: Ability of us (all employee) to have our schedules, leaves, benefits and performance view updates no matter where one is. Ease, security and quick approvals perfecting remote collaboration.
author: Joyce K.
pros: Ease of automating HR time consuming tasks, single page with rich employee and candidates information, effective strategies of tracking attendance, simplicity of benefits administration as well as conflict-free scheduling among many more.
cons: My experience is enough evidence this application can lift any size of organization to unexpected level,no improvement I can recommend at this moment.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Zoho People good for leave management and attendance tracking
description: Overall I have liked using it everyday to check in as it allows me to see where my team is and for leave management approvals. I am currently testing check-in separation for office and WFH. Also testing the performance module connected to Zoho Bigin CRM.
author: Einstein W.
pros: Easy to use, available on web, and mobile app, and easy to use for leave management and employee attendance.
cons: The check-in with photo is a little clunky without good feedback like if internet connectivity was a problem or if photo lighting was not good etc. So sometimes it took 5 tries.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My thoughts on Zoho
description: It was average. I'd like for it to be an easier onboarding process but there's a learning curve. Overall it was smooth once I figured it out.
author: Keith B.
pros: I like how we can set up teams across the projects and track the teams work across various projects.
cons: It was a bit confusing initially. Time logs must roll up to timesheets and then projects vs jobs. We messed up the configuration a couple times.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Zoho People, the right software at the right price
description: Over all, its a system that fits does what we need at a price that we value. All other providers are far too expensive for what they do.
author: Bobby J.
pros: Zoho People ius Easy to use with good online example of the work flow on you tune and great online documentation
cons: Some of the menu navigations can be a bit hard to follow. Some of the menu's have changed and yet the online Videos do not reflect this.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Setup is difficult, but once done, automations makes everything easy
description: Once the consultant was hired, everything was easy. Zoho People could do everything I asked for and then some. If you are a nontechnical founder, you may have some trouble with it. Just outsource and get it done.
author: Cedric P.
pros: The amount of automations available. Once I hired a consultant to help, they were able to mind map my thoughts and bring them to life in Zoho People.
cons: The setup of the automations. It was very confusing at first and overwhelming as I had never used Zoho People before. I was able to hire a consultant to help me build out my first automations, but that was an unexpected cost in addition to the monthly platform fee.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Zoho's products are not just user friendly but also easy to implement
author: Harsimran K.
pros: Our experience so far has been fantastic, Zoho's products are not just user friendly but also easy to implement
cons: We don't have any,
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Easy software very User friendly.
description: Good software to keep track of the whole HR operations.
author: Elena S.
pros: It is very easy to track the time working. I used it to make accountable the hours at my job. Easy as well for managers to access the info.
cons: Unfortunately if you forgot to check in there was no way to get the hours back.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nice choice to start with for small organization
author: Edward L.
pros: Zoho People is easy to use and manage. It's very cost effective for a small organization. It helps our charity managing timesheet and work arrangement efficiently
cons: Some of our staff reflects that the Zoho People App can be more user-friendly. They have difficulties during their registration.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Pro Product for all Business Size
description: Been associated with Zoho for the last 10 yrs and never gives a thought to look for alternative options. Software built in India for the world tag goes well for them.
author: Krishnan H.
pros: User Friendly. Offers complete flexibility in plans. Awesome product line up for driving HR functions
cons: Jumpstart pricing is on a higher side. Though there are adequate videos & help links available but in person support cost can be lesser.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: A feature-rich HRMS that offers great value for money.
description: Overall, Zoho People is a robust HRMS that handles our core HR operations effectively. Once you get past the learning curve of the setup, it becomes a very powerful tool for user account management and automating daily HR tasks. It integrates perfectly with the rest of the Zoho ecosystem.
author: Likitesh G.
pros: I appreciate the high level of customization. The ability to create custom forms and workflows allows us to tailor the system exactly to our company's needs. The value for money is also excellent compared to other enterprise HR tools. The leave and attendance tracking features are seamless and work well on the mobile app.
cons: The initial setup and implementation can be a bit overwhelming because there are so many settings. The user interface (UI) feels slightly outdated in some modules. occasionally, customer support can take a little while to resolve complex technical tickets.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Saves time and makes HR management effortless
author: Mathew M.
pros: Zoho People has saves time and makes hiring process Effortless and you can set automation in onboarding and offboarding. It also reduces errors and makes workflow runs smoothly.
cons: Zoho people integrates with a variety of other platforms to make sure the tool works clear with existing tools hence no dislike.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: ZOHO review
description: The portal is very good. We are planning on migrating our entire HRMS to this tool. The security is also good. And we are in the process of implementing our hr guidelines here.
author: Vedant J.
pros: The features are quite extensive and you can manage all your HR operations from a single, uniform platform. The user account management is quite easy and you can access all the data from one place
cons: Facing issues with getting the right documentation or videos to navigate the portal. Other than that everything is good
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best for Small Industry
description: With Zoho People we have managed our organisation smoothly, with tons of features it made our attendance to payroll easy
author: Bhavin P.
pros: Zoho People is Best for Small Business, Comes with Best Features available in Free Plan, If you are using Free plan it will surely fits your needs
cons: Need Phone Support as sometimes we need technical support but over mail is time consuming process so need tele support
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great HR Tool for Time off and check in and out.
description: Very good features. All we need to submit PTO time and also time tracking for check in and out.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Zoho People lets us manage our PTO requests in very much detail. It is easy to submit for team member and they can see what time they have left.
cons: Auto detection of team members and rejecting requests would be great. We always have to manually check if another team member is out already and then make a decision based on that.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Functionally decent but improvements are in order
description: Useful, I would say in general. Customer support requires improvement. More people need to be hired.
author: SAURAV J.
pros: Easy functionality. The interface is friendly enough. Seems to load quickly as well. Decent overall.
cons: Some buttons should be easier to find. For instance, locating the section on billings & subscription
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best cloud based HR solution for Big Companies
description: I think zoho people is an ideal HR software for large companies
author: Tracy S.
pros: It was helpful, very professional platform, as HR it has everything to automate all processes and have them in one place.
cons: I can't say it's too complicated but not too user friendly either
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: All in One solution for onboarding and leave tracking
author: Anup J.
pros: It is an all in one platform for onboarding and leave tracking. It helps to track employee monthly work done remotely and associate it with the payroll.
cons: Setting up is a little tricky with all menus. But overall the experience is not so bad. Good Reviews.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Experience using zoho peole
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The best part about zoho i felt when having interactions with my colleagues is its pricing with no extra hidden pricing and really flexible pricing and other best part about zoho is it has great compatibility with integrating other zoho product.
cons: When we started using it and at the time of setup people may feel overwhelmed by the options and feature they provide cause its just too many and if you dont have clear mindmap for how you wish to use it, it might create a overhead.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Fantastic!
description: When I first started using the Zoho People product it was so easy to learn and navigate through the platfrom!
author: Miranda R.
pros: That there is a strong community that can connect together through an easily managed platform. It is so nice!
cons: That they do not have more options available for all my social media connections, and buisness needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: For your Organization and project PnL
author: Harshal M.
pros: Easy tracking, great dashboard, great reporting for 200+ projects
cons: It has a learning curve and many parts that are not under simple subscriptions
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great for HR Professionals
author: Duane N.
pros: Really easy to use and made onboarding new employees a breeze
cons: I wish there were more integrations with tools
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
